search_queries_used: DHA telehealth nausea vomiting clinical guideline PDF
population_applicability: Broad nausea and vomiting population appears applicable, but no precise age range is stated in the applicability section.
setting_applicability: Partial: exact source is limited to DHA-licensed telehealth services.
UAE_applicability: Verified for Dubai and DHA-licensed telehealth only; broader UAE applicability is not asserted.
recency_verification: Official Version/Issue 2 copy opened on 2026-07-11; document states revision date 2029-02-21.
superseded_check: DHA official telehealth portal checked on 2026-07-11; no newer official issue was identified there.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Defines the exact Dubai telehealth scope and emergency exclusions.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Defines DHA-licensed telehealth scope and emergency and controlled-medication exclusions.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped nausea, vomiting, frequency, intake, hydration, and associated-symptom history fields.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Specifies distinction between nausea, vomiting, retching, and regurgitation and records duration, frequency, associated symptoms, intake, and likely causes.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped bleeding, severe pain, dehydration, headache, fever, and altered-state prompts.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists severe abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, neurological symptoms, chest pain, weight loss, dehydration, altered state, and metabolic concerns.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Directly supports mapped history-directed blood and urine investigation documentation.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: States that testing is history-directed and lists glucose, blood count, inflammatory markers, electrolytes, stool culture, and urinalysis.

evidence_items.direct_relationship: Reviewed to verify urgent escalation features; no autonomous referral instruction was mapped.
evidence_items.paraphrased_evidence_summary: Lists urgent referral features including haematemesis, neurological symptoms, chest pain, acute abdominal pain, gastrointestinal bleeding, and immunosuppression.

unresolved_source_gaps: The baseline workflow is setting-agnostic and broader than the exact source.
The baseline gastroenteritis diagnosis label and treatment choices are not treated as source-supported by this presentation-level mapping.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
